question_en: A customer reports an unauthorized UPI transaction of Rs 50,000 from their savings account on the 5th working day after the fraud occurred. The fraud was due to a third-party breach, not customer negligence. What is the maximum liability the customer bears under RBI guidelines?
question_hi: एक ग्राहक धोखाधड़ी होने के 5वें कार्य दिवस पर अपने बचत खाते से Rs 50,000 के अनधिकृत UPI लेनदेन की रिपोर्ट करता है। धोखाधड़ी तीसरे पक्ष की सेंध के कारण हुई, ग्राहक की लापरवाही नहीं। RBI दिशानिर्देशों के तहत ग्राहक की अधिकतम देनदारी कितनी है?
question_hinglish: Ek customer apne savings account se Rs 50,000 ke unauthorized UPI transaction ki report 5th working day pe karta hai fraud hone ke baad. Fraud third-party breach ki wajah se hua, customer ki galti nahi. RBI guidelines ke under customer ki maximum liability kitni hai?
question_te: ఒక customer fraud జరిగిన 5వ working day న తన savings account నుండి Rs 50,000 unauthorized UPI transaction report చేస్తారు. Fraud third-party breach వల్ల జరిగింది, customer negligence కాదు. RBI guidelines ప్రకారం customer maximum liability ఎంత?
question_bn: একজন customer fraud হওয়ার 5তম working day-তে তাদের savings account থেকে Rs 50,000 unauthorized UPI transaction report করেন। Fraud third-party breach-এর কারণে হয়েছে, customer-এর negligence নয়। RBI guidelines অনুযায়ী customer-এর maximum liability কত?
question_ta: ஒரு customer fraud நடந்த 5வது working day-ல தங்கள் savings account-லிருந்து Rs 50,000 unauthorized UPI transaction report பண்றாரு. Fraud third-party breach-ஆல நடந்தது, customer negligence இல்ல. RBI guidelines-ன் படி customer-ோட maximum liability எவ்வளவு?
answer: Under RBI's Circular on Limiting Liability of Customers in Unauthorised Electronic Banking Transactions (July 6, 2017), the customer's maximum liability depends on the reporting timeline and account type. Since the report was made on the 5th working day (between 4 and 7 working days) and the fraud was due to a third-party breach: For a savings account, the maximum customer liability is Rs 10,000. If reported within 3 working days, liability would have been ZERO. Beyond 7 working days, liability is determined by the bank's Board-approved policy. The bank must effect a shadow reversal (credit) within 10 working days of customer notification, and resolve the complaint within 90 days.

question_en: My bank classified a loan account as fraud. What is the timeline for filing the Fraud Monitoring Return (FMR) with RBI, and at what threshold must the bank report to CRILC?
question_hi: मेरे बैंक ने एक लोन अकाउंट को फ्रॉड के रूप में वर्गीकृत किया है। RBI को फ्रॉड मॉनिटरिंग रिटर्न (FMR) फाइल करने की समय सीमा क्या है, और किस सीमा पर बैंक को CRILC को रिपोर्ट करना होगा?
question_hinglish: Mere bank ne ek loan account ko fraud classify kiya hai. RBI ko Fraud Monitoring Return (FMR) file karne ki timeline kya hai, aur kis threshold pe bank ko CRILC ko report karna hoga?
question_te: నా bank ఒక loan account ను fraud గా classify చేసింది. RBI కి Fraud Monitoring Return (FMR) file చేయడానికి timeline ఏమిటి, ఏ threshold వద్ద bank CRILC కి report చేయాలి?
question_bn: আমার bank একটা loan account-কে fraud হিসেবে classify করেছে। RBI-তে Fraud Monitoring Return (FMR) file করার timeline কত, আর কোন threshold-এ bank-কে CRILC-তে report করতে হবে?
question_ta: என் bank ஒரு loan account-ஐ fraud-ஆ classify பண்ணிருக்கு. RBI-க்கு Fraud Monitoring Return (FMR) file பண்ற timeline என்ன, எந்த threshold-ல bank CRILC-க்கு report பண்ணணும்?
answer: Under the revised RBI Master Directions on Fraud Risk Management (July 2024), the Fraud Monitoring Return (FMR) must be filed within 14 days from the date of fraud classification (reduced from the earlier 21-day timeline). For Red-Flagged Accounts (RFA) and confirmed fraud cases, the bank must report to CRILC (Central Repository of Information on Large Credits) within 7 days. The CRILC reporting threshold for fraud and RFA cases is Rs 3 crore (significantly reduced from the earlier Rs 50 crore threshold).

question_en: A fintech lending app wants to offer First Loss Default Guarantee (FLDG) to the bank it partners with. What is the maximum FLDG cap allowed by RBI, and in what forms can the guarantee be provided?
question_hi: एक फिनटेक लेंडिंग ऐप अपने पार्टनर बैंक को फर्स्ट लॉस डिफॉल्ट गारंटी (FLDG) देना चाहता है। RBI द्वारा अनुमत अधिकतम FLDG सीमा क्या है, और गारंटी किन रूपों में दी जा सकती है?
question_hinglish: Ek fintech lending app apne partner bank ko First Loss Default Guarantee (FLDG) offer karna chahta hai. RBI ne maximum FLDG cap kitna rakha hai, aur guarantee kin forms mein di ja sakti hai?
question_te: ఒక fintech lending app తన partner bank కి First Loss Default Guarantee (FLDG) offer చేయాలనుకుంటోంది. RBI maximum FLDG cap ఎంత allow చేసింది, guarantee ఏ forms లో ఇవ్వవచ్చు?
question_bn: একটা fintech lending app তাদের partner bank-কে First Loss Default Guarantee (FLDG) offer করতে চায়। RBI maximum FLDG cap কত allow করেছে, আর guarantee কোন forms-এ দেওয়া যায়?
question_ta: ஒரு fintech lending app தங்கள் partner bank-க்கு First Loss Default Guarantee (FLDG) offer பண்ண நினைக்குது. RBI maximum FLDG cap எவ்வளவு allow பண்ணிருக்கு, guarantee எந்த forms-ல கொடுக்கலாம்?
answer: Under RBI Guidelines on Default Loss Guarantee in Digital Lending (June 8, 2023), the maximum FLDG cap is 5% of the outstanding loan portfolio disbursed during any specified period. The guarantee can be provided in three permissible forms: (1) Cash deposit with the lending institution, (2) Fixed deposit with a lien marked in favor of the lender, or (3) Bank guarantee in favor of the lender. The FLDG must be invoked within a maximum overdue period of 120 days. Any FLDG arrangement must be disclosed in the Key Fact Statement (KFS) provided to borrowers.

question_en: What are the revised Priority Sector Lending (PSL) targets for agriculture and micro enterprises effective from April 2025? What is the housing loan limit under PSL for metropolitan cities?
question_hi: अप्रैल 2025 से प्रभावी कृषि और सूक्ष्म उद्यमों के लिए संशोधित प्राथमिकता क्षेत्र ऋण (PSL) लक्ष्य क्या हैं? महानगरों के लिए PSL के तहत आवास ऋण सीमा क्या है?
question_hinglish: April 2025 se effective agriculture aur micro enterprises ke liye revised Priority Sector Lending (PSL) targets kya hain? Metropolitan cities ke liye PSL ke under housing loan limit kya hai?
question_te: April 2025 నుండి effective agriculture మరియు micro enterprises కి revised Priority Sector Lending (PSL) targets ఏమిటి? Metropolitan cities కి PSL కింద housing loan limit ఎంత?
question_bn: April 2025 থেকে effective agriculture আর micro enterprises-এর জন্য revised Priority Sector Lending (PSL) targets কত? Metropolitan cities-এর জন্য PSL-এর under housing loan limit কত?
question_ta: April 2025-லிருந்து effective agriculture மற்றும் micro enterprises-க்கு revised Priority Sector Lending (PSL) targets என்ன? Metropolitan cities-க்கு PSL-ல housing loan limit எவ்வளவு?
answer: The revised PSL targets effective April 1, 2025 are: Total PSL remains at 40% of Adjusted Net Bank Credit (ANBC). Agriculture target increased from 18% to 20% of ANBC, with the Small and Marginal Farmers sub-target increased from 8% to 10%. Micro Enterprises target increased from 7.5% to 10% of ANBC. Weaker Sections target remains at 12%. For housing loans under PSL, the limits by city classification are: Metropolitan cities (population above 50 lakh): Rs 50 lakh; Cities with population 10-50 lakh: Rs 45 lakh; Other centers: Rs 35 lakh.

question_en: A bank branch detects a series of cash deposits totaling Rs 12 lakh in a customer's account within one month. What reports must the bank file with FIU-IND, and what are the filing deadlines?
question_hi: एक बैंक शाखा को पता चलता है कि एक ग्राहक के खाते में एक महीने में कुल Rs 12 लाख के नकद जमा हुए हैं। बैंक को FIU-IND को कौन सी रिपोर्ट दाखिल करनी होगी और दाखिल करने की समय सीमा क्या है?
question_hinglish: Ek bank branch detect karta hai ki ek customer ke account mein ek mahine mein total Rs 12 lakh ke cash deposits hue hain. Bank ko FIU-IND ko kaun si reports file karni hongi aur filing deadlines kya hain?
question_te: ఒక bank branch ఒక customer account లో ఒక నెలలో total Rs 12 లక్షల cash deposits detect చేస్తుంది. Bank FIU-IND కి ఏ reports file చేయాలి, filing deadlines ఏమిటి?
question_bn: একটা bank branch detect করে যে একজন customer-এর account-এ এক মাসে মোট Rs 12 লক্ষ cash deposit হয়েছে। Bank-কে FIU-IND-তে কোন reports file করতে হবে আর filing deadlines কত?
question_ta: ஒரு bank branch ஒரு customer account-ல ஒரு மாசத்துல total Rs 12 லட்சம் cash deposits detect பண்றாங்க. Bank FIU-IND-க்கு என்ன reports file பண்ணணும், filing deadlines என்ன?
answer: Under the Prevention of Money Laundering Act (PMLA) 2002 and RBI KYC Master Direction, the bank must file a Cash Transaction Report (CTR) with FIU-IND because the aggregate cash transactions exceed Rs 10 lakh in a month. The CTR must be filed by the 15th of the month following the transaction month. Additionally, if the transaction pattern appears suspicious (e.g., structuring to avoid reporting, unusual for the customer's profile), the bank must also file a Suspicious Transaction Report (STR) within 7 working days of forming the suspicion. There is no minimum threshold for STR filing --- it is based on suspicion, not amount. The bank must maintain records of all transactions for 5 years from the date of transaction under Section 12(1)(a) of PMLA.

question_en: What are the RBI-mandated timelines for periodic KYC updation based on customer risk category? How must banks upload KYC records to the Central KYC Registry (CKYC)?
question_hi: ग्राहक जोखिम श्रेणी के आधार पर आवधिक KYC अपडेशन के लिए RBI द्वारा अनिवार्य समय सीमा क्या है? बैंकों को केंद्रीय KYC रजिस्ट्री (CKYC) में KYC रिकॉर्ड कैसे अपलोड करने होंगे?
question_hinglish: Customer risk category ke basis pe periodic KYC updation ke liye RBI-mandated timelines kya hain? Banks ko Central KYC Registry (CKYC) mein KYC records kaise upload karne hain?
question_te: Customer risk category ఆధారంగా periodic KYC updation కి RBI-mandated timelines ఏమిటి? Banks Central KYC Registry (CKYC) కి KYC records ఎలా upload చేయాలి?
question_bn: Customer risk category-র ভিত্তিতে periodic KYC updation-এর জন্য RBI-mandated timelines কত? Banks-কে Central KYC Registry (CKYC)-তে KYC records কীভাবে upload করতে হবে?
question_ta: Customer risk category அடிப்படையில periodic KYC updation-க்கு RBI-mandated timelines என்ன? Banks Central KYC Registry (CKYC)-ல KYC records எப்படி upload பண்ணணும்?
answer: Under RBI KYC Master Direction 2016 (updated 2024-2025), the periodic KYC updation timelines based on customer risk category are: High Risk customers: every 2 years; Medium Risk customers: every 8 years; Low Risk customers: every 10 years. For the Central KYC Registry (CKYC), operated by CERSAI, banks must upload KYC records within 3 working days of account opening. Before onboarding any new customer, banks must search the CKYC registry to check if the customer's KYC already exists. Customer Due Diligence methods include: Aadhaar biometric e-KYC, digital KYC, Aadhaar OTP-based e-KYC, and Video-based Customer Identification Process (V-CIP).

question_en: My company has a turnover of Rs 8 crore. What are the GST returns I must file, their due dates, and which annual returns are mandatory at this turnover level?
question_hi: मेरी कंपनी का टर्नओवर Rs 8 करोड़ है। मुझे कौन से GST रिटर्न फाइल करने होंगे, उनकी नियत तारीखें क्या हैं, और इस टर्नओवर स्तर पर कौन से वार्षिक रिटर्न अनिवार्य हैं?
question_hinglish: Meri company ka turnover Rs 8 crore hai. Mujhe kaun se GST returns file karne honge, unki due dates kya hain, aur is turnover level pe kaun se annual returns mandatory hain?
question_te: నా company turnover Rs 8 crore. నేను ఏ GST returns file చేయాలి, వాటి due dates ఏమిటి, ఈ turnover level కి ఏ annual returns mandatory?
question_bn: আমার company-র turnover Rs 8 crore। আমাকে কোন GST returns file করতে হবে, তাদের due dates কত, আর এই turnover level-এ কোন annual returns mandatory?
question_ta: என் company turnover Rs 8 crore. நான் என்ன GST returns file பண்ணணும், அவங்க due dates என்ன, இந்த turnover level-ல என்ன annual returns mandatory?
answer: At Rs 8 crore turnover, you must file monthly returns: GSTR-1 (outward supply details) by the 11th of the following month, and GSTR-3B (summary return with tax liability and ITC) by the 20th of the following month. Monthly filing is mandatory because your turnover exceeds Rs 5 crore (QRMP scheme is only for turnover up to Rs 5 crore). For annual returns: GSTR-9 (annual return) is mandatory as your turnover exceeds Rs 2 crore, and GSTR-9C (reconciliation statement/self-certified) is mandatory as your turnover exceeds Rs 5 crore. Both GSTR-9 and GSTR-9C are due by 31st December of the following financial year.

question_en: Our listed company just received a penalty of Rs 15 lakh from a sectoral regulator. Under SEBI LODR Regulations, what is the disclosure timeline, and what are the materiality thresholds for event disclosure?
question_hi: हमारी सूचीबद्ध कंपनी को एक सेक्टोरल रेगुलेटर से Rs 15 लाख का जुर्माना मिला है। SEBI LODR विनियमों के तहत प्रकटीकरण की समय सीमा क्या है, और घटना प्रकटीकरण के लिए भौतिकता सीमाएं क्या हैं?
question_hinglish: Hamari listed company ko ek sectoral regulator se Rs 15 lakh ka penalty mila hai. SEBI LODR Regulations ke under disclosure timeline kya hai, aur event disclosure ke liye materiality thresholds kya hain?
question_te: మా listed company కి ఒక sectoral regulator నుండి Rs 15 లక్షల penalty వచ్చింది. SEBI LODR Regulations కింద disclosure timeline ఏమిటి, event disclosure కి materiality thresholds ఏమిటి?
question_bn: আমাদের listed company একটা sectoral regulator থেকে Rs 15 লক্ষ penalty পেয়েছে। SEBI LODR Regulations-এর under disclosure timeline কত, আর event disclosure-এর materiality thresholds কত?
question_ta: எங்கள் listed company ஒரு sectoral regulator-கிட்டயிருந்து Rs 15 லட்சம் penalty வாங்கியிருக்கு. SEBI LODR Regulations-ன் under disclosure timeline என்ன, event disclosure-க்கு materiality thresholds என்ன?
answer: Under SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, Regulation 30 requires disclosure of material events within 24 hours of occurrence. Since the penalty of Rs 15 lakh exceeds the Rs 1 lakh threshold for penalties from sectoral regulators, it must be disclosed within 24 hours. The general materiality thresholds for event disclosure under Regulation 30 are: (1) 2% of turnover, OR (2) 2% of net worth, OR (3) 5% of average absolute value of profit/loss of the last 3 audited consolidated financial statements --- whichever is the lowest. For penalties/fines specifically: penalties of Rs 1 lakh or more from sectoral regulators, or Rs 10 lakh or more from other authorities, must be disclosed within 24 hours. Quarterly financial results must be filed within 45 days of quarter end, and annual audited results within 60 days of financial year end.

question_en: Our bank is deploying an AI chatbot for customer service. Under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA) 2023, what are the maximum penalties for data breach notification failure, and what obligations does a Significant Data Fiduciary have?
question_hi: हमारा बैंक ग्राहक सेवा के लिए AI चैटबॉट तैनात कर रहा है। डिजिटल व्यक्तिगत डेटा संरक्षण अधिनियम (DPDPA) 2023 के तहत डेटा उल्लंघन अधिसूचना विफलता के लिए अधिकतम जुर्माना क्या है, और महत्वपूर्ण डेटा प्रत्ययी के क्या दायित्व हैं?
question_hinglish: Hamara bank customer service ke liye AI chatbot deploy kar raha hai. Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA) 2023 ke under data breach notification failure ka maximum penalty kya hai, aur Significant Data Fiduciary ki kya obligations hain?
question_te: మా bank customer service కోసం AI chatbot deploy చేస్తోంది. Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA) 2023 కింద data breach notification failure కి maximum penalty ఎంత, Significant Data Fiduciary obligations ఏమిటి?
question_bn: আমাদের bank customer service-এর জন্য AI chatbot deploy করছে। Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA) 2023-এর under data breach notification failure-র maximum penalty কত, আর Significant Data Fiduciary-র কী obligations আছে?
question_ta: எங்க bank customer service-க்கு AI chatbot deploy பண்றாங்க. Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA) 2023-ன் under data breach notification failure-க்கு maximum penalty எவ்வளவு, Significant Data Fiduciary-ோட obligations என்ன?
answer: Under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA) 2023, the penalty framework is: Failure to implement reasonable security safeguards leading to a data breach: maximum Rs 250 crore. Failure to notify the Data Protection Board and affected data principals of a breach: maximum Rs 200 crore. Non-compliance by a Significant Data Fiduciary (SDF) with additional obligations: maximum Rs 150 crore. A Significant Data Fiduciary must: (1) Appoint a Data Protection Officer (DPO) based in India, (2) Conduct periodic Data Protection Impact Assessments (DPIA), (3) Undertake independent data audits, and (4) Ensure data processing is verifiable and transparent. Importantly, the Data Fiduciary remains liable for breaches by third-party Data Processors, which is directly relevant to AI chatbot deployments where customer data flows through third-party AI services.

question_en: Our insurance company wants to outsource its AI-powered claims processing to a third-party vendor. Under RBI and IRDAI guidelines, what functions cannot be outsourced, and what are the key compliance requirements for IT outsourcing?
question_hi: हमारी बीमा कंपनी अपनी AI-संचालित दावा प्रसंस्करण को तीसरे पक्ष के विक्रेता को आउटसोर्स करना चाहती है। RBI और IRDAI दिशानिर्देशों के तहत कौन से कार्य आउटसोर्स नहीं किए जा सकते, और IT आउटसोर्सिंग की प्रमुख अनुपालन आवश्यकताएं क्या हैं?
question_hinglish: Hamari insurance company apni AI-powered claims processing ko third-party vendor ko outsource karna chahti hai. RBI aur IRDAI guidelines ke under kaun se functions outsource nahi kiye ja sakte, aur IT outsourcing ke key compliance requirements kya hain?
question_te: మా insurance company తన AI-powered claims processing ని third-party vendor కి outsource చేయాలనుకుంటోంది. RBI మరియు IRDAI guidelines కింద ఏ functions outsource చేయలేము, IT outsourcing key compliance requirements ఏమిటి?
question_bn: আমাদের insurance company তাদের AI-powered claims processing third-party vendor-কে outsource করতে চায়। RBI আর IRDAI guidelines-এর under কোন functions outsource করা যায় না, আর IT outsourcing-এর key compliance requirements কী?
question_ta: எங்க insurance company தங்கள் AI-powered claims processing-ஐ third-party vendor-க்கு outsource பண்ண நினைக்குது. RBI மற்றும் IRDAI guidelines-ன் under என்ன functions outsource பண்ண முடியாது, IT outsourcing-ோட key compliance requirements என்ன?
answer: Under RBI Master Direction on Outsourcing of IT Services (April 2023, effective October 1, 2023), Regulated Entities cannot outsource: core banking functions, internal audit, and compliance functions. Under IRDAI guidelines, insurers cannot outsource decision-making functions including: product designing, actuarial functions, enterprise risk management, underwriting decisions, claims decisions, and policyholder grievance redressal. Key compliance requirements for IT outsourcing include: (1) Board-approved IT outsourcing policy mandatory, (2) Material outsourcing requires heightened oversight, (3) Customer data segregation and confidentiality clauses mandatory, (4) Only the regulated entity can have access to borrower/policyholder data, (5) Due diligence on third-party service providers using a risk-based approach. Existing outsourcing agreements had to comply by April 9, 2024 or the renewal date, whichever was earlier.
